Class UpdateCreateDeleteAudit<T extends BaseID<Integer>>

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.rest.DailyLimitUpdCreateLogger<T>
grafiosch.rest.UpdateCreate<T>
grafiosch.rest.UpdateCreateResource<T>
grafiosch.rest.UpdateCreateDeleteAudit<T>
Type Parameters:
T - The type of the entity to be managed, which must extend BaseID and typically should be an instance of Auditable for rights checking.
Direct Known Subclasses:
GTNetMessageResource, HistoryquoteResourceBase, UpdateCreateDeleteAuditResource
public abstract class UpdateCreateDeleteAudit<T extends BaseID<Integer>> extends UpdateCreateResource<T>
Abstract REST controller that extends UpdateCreateResource to include functionality for deleting entities with auditing and rights checking. It is designed for shared resources where delete operations depend on the authenticated user's permissions.

  • Constructor Details

    • UpdateCreateDeleteAudit

      public UpdateCreateDeleteAudit()

  • Method Details

    • deleteById

      protected Optional<T> deleteById(Integer id)
      Deletes an entity by its ID after verifying the current user's rights. If the entity is found and the user has deletion rights, it is deleted from the repository and the operation is logged.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the entity to delete.
      Returns:
      An Optional containing the deleted entity if found and deleted, otherwise an empty Optional (though exceptions are thrown for not found or no rights).
      Throws:
      SecurityException - If the authenticated user does not have sufficient rights to delete the entity.
      NoSuchElementException - If no entity with the given ID is found.

    • hasRightsForDeleteEntity

      protected boolean hasRightsForDeleteEntity(User user, T entity)
      Checks if the given user has the necessary rights to delete the specified entity. This typically involves checking if the user is the owner or has administrative privileges.
      Parameters:
      user - The user whose rights are to be checked.
      entity - The entity to be deleted.
      Returns:
      true if the user has rights to delete the entity, false otherwise. The default implementation casts the entity to Auditable for rights checking.

    • logAndAudit

      protected void logAndAudit(Class<T> zclass, Integer id)
